title: exoudenoo #1847
definition:
1) to hold and treat as of no account, utterly to despise
 2) to set at nought, treat with contempt
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to hold and treat as of no account, utterly to despise
 2) to set at nought, treat with contempt

    NASB:  to despise, treat with contempt:
